title: Install locked release evidence dependencies in workflow
outOfScope: Changing release tag policy or release evidence contents
Publishing a release outside the exact-SHA release workflow

sources.reason: The failing release job invokes the supply-chain evidence generator on a clean runner.
The locked development dependency set contains cyclonedx-python-lib required by the evidence generator.
The release job executes this evidence generator and imports CycloneDX libraries.
Repository invariants require workflow dependency installation to use the hashed lock file.
Defines the bounded release workflow remediation.

riskAssessment.reason: A missing locked dependency prevents the final release evidence from being generated on GitHub Actions.

executionDecision.reason: The failing release run provides concrete evidence and the fix is limited to installing the existing locked dependencies.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm the release job installs dependencies from the hashed lock file before running evidence generation.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record checkpoints before and after the release workflow remediation.

acceptance: The release workflow installs dependencies from requirements-dev.lock with hash verification before invoking check_supply_chain.py.
The workflow remediation passes repository workflow invariants and local quality checks.
A release workflow rerun reaches source-bound evidence generation without ModuleNotFoundError.
guidelines: Use the repository's locked dependency installation pattern for GitHub Actions.
Keep the release workflow exact-SHA and tag-precondition gates unchanged.
Do not weaken or bypass release evidence verification.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: clean release runner has the locked CycloneDX dependency before evidence generation
exact-SHA identity, tag precondition, and evidence-subject checks remain unchanged
v0.5.28 is not published by the Work Item PR itself

intent.problem: The exact-SHA release workflow reaches source-bound evidence generation on a clean runner without installing cyclonedx-python-lib, so publication fails before creating the tag or release.
constraints: Keep v0.5.28 release publication last and exact-SHA bound.
Do not alter release identity or evidence verification semantics.
intent.rationale: Installing the already-declared locked development dependencies in the release job makes the existing evidence generator runnable while preserving dependency integrity and release gates.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly confirmed the remediation loop and required release publication last; the release workflow fix is necessary to complete that scoped task.

rollbackNote: Revert this workflow-only remediation; no release tag or GitHub Release is created by the Work Item PR itself.
